scripts.ensure:cli-dist: pnpm -C ../../packages/api-adapter build && pnpm -C ../../packages/router-core build && pnpm -C ../../plugins/router-local build && pnpm -C ../../packages/node build && pnpm -C ../payments build:server && pnpm -C ../cli build
scripts.prebuild: npm run ensure:cli-dist && npm run brand:electron-dev && npm run ensure:native && node ../../scripts/remove-paths.mjs dist
scripts.predev: npm run ensure:cli-dist && npm run brand:electron-dev && npm run ensure:native
scripts.prestart: npm run ensure:cli-dist && npm run brand:electron-dev && npm run ensure:native
scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on tcp:5174 file:dist/main/main.js file:dist/main/preload.cjs && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5174 electron .
scripts.dev:electron:debug: wait-on tcp:5174 file:dist/main/main.js file:dist/main/preload.cjs && cross-env ANTSEED_DESKTOP_DEBUG=1 VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5174 electron . --debug-runtime
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run prepare-dist && electron-builder
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && npm run prepare-dist && electron-builder --mac
scripts.release:mac: npm run build && npm run prepare-dist && node scripts/release-mac.mjs
scripts.dist:win: npm run build && npm run prepare-dist && electron-builder --win
scripts.release:win: npm run build && npm run prepare-dist && node scripts/release-win.mjs
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build && npm run prepare-dist && electron-builder --linux
